title: Establish turf
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Establish turf demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a turf establishment plan

pcs.text: Collect representative soil samples of turf establishment area for testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect representative soil samples of turf establishment area for testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect representative soil samples of turf establishment area for testing.

pcs.text: Package and label soil samples for laboratory testing according to laboratory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Package and label soil samples for laboratory testing according to laboratory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Package and label soil samples for laboratory testing according to laboratory requirements.

pcs.text: Perform field tests of soil and record results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform field tests of soil and record results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform field tests of soil and record results.

pcs.text: Identify and select turf grass species and propagation method according to workplace or client planned outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select turf grass species and propagation method according to workplace or client planned outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select turf grass species and propagation method according to workplace or client planned outcomes.

pcs.text: Assess the site for physical and cultural impediments to turf establishment and record results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the site for physical and cultural impediments to turf establishment and record results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the site for physical and cultural impediments to turf establishment and record results.

pcs.text: Interpret results and prepare a turf establishment plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret results and prepare a turf establishment plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret results and prepare a turf establishment plan.

pcs.text: Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement weed control strategy in preparation for turf establishment activities.
